  "mnemonics": ["Flip-Flops FLIP on a CLOCK edge and FLOP to the new state.", "State Machines REMEMBER: Current State + Input = Next State + Output.", "SETUP and HOLD times are like a DOOR: Data must be ready before the clock (setup) and must not leave until the door is fully closed (hold)."],
